title: Reworked Phantoms
description: No more insomnia triggers, phantoms are now only rebalanced full moon threats!
body:
This mod gives phantoms a clearer, more meaningful role. Gone are the days of insomnia-based spawning, phantoms now appear **only during full moons**, and only **once you've made progress** in your world. Whether you're tired of being punished for skipping sleep or simply want phantoms to feel more thematic and threatening, this mod offers a refined, lightweight alternative.

 

## **Features**

*   The `doInsomnia` gamerule is disabled automatically.
*   Phantoms will **only spawn at midnigh during full moon nights** (1 night out of 8).
*   Phantoms won’t spawn unless the player has unlocked the advancement **"Acquire Hardware"** (i.e., smelted iron).
*   When a full moon hits midnight, **each player** will trigger a **phantom group spawn**, based on difficulty (Easy: 1 to 2 phantoms, Normal: 2 to 3 phantoms, Hard: 2 to 4 phantoms).
*   If the entire group is slain, a new group will spawn after **10 seconds**, repeating until **the end of the night**.
*   Phantom stats have been adjusted: health is reduced to 10 HP (from 20), damage is increased to 5 (from 2), and knockback strength is increased to 1 (from 0).  
      
    

## **FAQ**

**Q: Does the mod work on existing worlds?**           
**A:** Yes! This mod works perfectly fine on pre-existing worlds.

**Q: Do phantoms spawn in Creative Mode?**                         
**A:** Yes, phantoms can spawn in Creative Mode just like in vanilla Minecraft. If needed, you can disable phantom spawning entirely using the `doPhantomSpawning` gamerule (or via the config file in Forge versions 1.19.3 and earlier).
